M-VERIFY-UX.NAME: Verify Result UX
M-VERIFY-UX.Purpose: Provide a polished result page after verification with copyable proxy values and clear manual MTProto setup guidance.

Scope.Item: Render a success page with clear “proxy ready” messaging
Expose copy-to-clipboard actions for tg://proxy and manual fields
Explain which values belong in Telegram manual MTProto proxy fields
Remain readable on mobile and desktop

Interfaces.Interface: Displays final proxy delivery UI for a verified user.

Risks.Risk: Poor copy UX leaves users unable to add the proxy successfully
Missing manual MTProto instructions increases support burden
